title: Raise structured api.json size limit for corelib-scale packages

source.subject: Raise structured api.json size limit for corelib-scale packages.

body:
## Outcome

Raise structured api.json size limit for corelib-scale packages.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
- Structured **api.json** is the hierarchical contract for package docs (types, members, **typeRef** links)—not parallel string-key tables outside the schema.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`88ee828`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/88ee828) — Raise structured api.json size limit for corelib-scale packages.
